description: Department routing examples: finance, HR, shipping, slogan decode, multi-lane.

examples.context: Shop needs rush vendor payment for job materials
examples.resolution: Finance approved with PO and receipt; no verbal OK.

examples.context: New hire asks agent to ping HR for insurance activation
examples.resolution: Form sent; no personal details in thread.

examples.context: HR admin asks who started fight on floor
examples.resolution: Declined gossip; offered written incident facts only if required.

examples.context: Customer DM asking ship date; system shows in stock
examples.resolution: Dock said pallet staged Friday; customer told Friday only.

examples.context: Production waiting on inbound vinyl roll
examples.resolution: Receiving showed vendor short ship; production replanned before promise.

examples.context: Manager email: grab low hanging fruit this week
examples.resolution: Got ranked list: job-440 proof, job-441 chase payment.

examples.context: Client wants free layout revision; manager says teamwork
examples.resolution: Clarified CO required; routed mf-tool-003 for scope boundary.

examples.context: Customer wants pickup today; balance unpaid
examples.resolution: Dock ready; finance hold until partial paid; customer told both facts.
